title: heterostemma samoense
intro: Heterostemma samoense is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Samoan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Heterostemma samoense include the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and alleviate muscle spasms. Heterostemma samoense can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
